note: All 3 trigger files are lib/ store modules, not component/page files. No component or page currently triggers the extractor skip, so no known live class-truncation incident exists today — but the mechanism silently zeroes Tailwind class extraction for any future file containing this exact regex substring, with no build warning. Formal empirical investigation (extractor experiment, emission diff) is Phase 3 scope per section 11 of the brief, not Phase 0.
